name: SILVER BULL RESOURCES, INC.
summary: Silver Bull Resources, Inc. is an exploration stage mining company incorporated in Nevada in 1993. It focuses on acquiring and developing mineral properties, primarily the Sierra Mojada Project in Mexico, which contains silver, zinc, lead, and copper mineralization. The company holds mineral concessions in Mexico and is pursuing a NAFTA arbitration claim. It has no known mineral reserves and no production operations.
